libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: Keep tests in-process and avoid external services. Do not use the removed org.apache.pekko.actor.TypedActor/TypedProps APIs; the 2.0.0-M1 jar no longer contains those classes. If a test deliberately exercises the DnsSettings sun.net.dns fallback, it may need --add-exports=java.base/sun.net.dns=ALL-UNNAMED for both JVM tests and native-image build, but that is optional coverage-specific setup rather than required library setup.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8742 [Automation] java run fails for org.apache.pekko:pekko-actor_2.13:2.0.0-M1; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Existing 1.1.5 tests that import TypedActor, TypedActorExtension, or TypedProps will not compile against 2.0.0-M1 because those classes are absent from the resolved artifact.
Adding org.apache.pekko:pekko-actor-typed_2.13 would cover a different Pekko module and should not be treated as required setup for pekko-actor_2.13.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra dependency, Docker image, environment variable, or system property is required for meaningful in-process coverage of org.apache.pekko:pekko-actor_2.13:2.0.0-M1. The resolved artifact only depends on scala-library and com.typesafe:config, and normal usage is via local ActorSystem/Props/config/serialization APIs.
